scripts.build:all: npm run build:auth && npm run build:vehicles && npm run build:traffic && npm run build:incidents && npm run build:notifications && npm run build:gateway
scripts.prisma:generate:all: npm run prisma:generate -w services/auth && npm run prisma:generate -w services/vehicles && npm run prisma:generate -w services/traffic && npm run prisma:generate -w services/incidents && npm run prisma:generate -w services/notifications
scripts.dev:all: npm run cleanup:ports && concurrently -n auth,vehicles,traffic,incidents,notifications,gateway -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,red "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:vehicles" "npm run dev:traffic" "npm run dev:incidents" "npm run dev:notifications" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.cleanup:ports: lsof -ti:4000-4005 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; echo 'Ports 4000-4005 cleared'
